# Aurelius (Jacques Azianou Komi)

> Full-stack developer and designer building thoughtful, high-quality web experiences.

## About

Aurelius (alias: @codebyajax) is a full-stack developer and designer with a focus on frontend engineering. He builds modern web applications using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, with an eye for design detail and polished user interfaces.

## Stack

- **Frontend**: React, Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Design**: UI/UX design, component systems, responsive layouts, motion/animation
- **Backend**: Node.js, REST APIs
- **Tooling**: Git, Turbopack, Vercel

## Projects

This portfolio showcases selected personal and client-facing projects spanning full-stack web apps, UI experiments, and open source work. Each project reflects attention to both engineering quality and visual craft.

## Open To

- Full-time job opportunities (frontend, full-stack, or design engineering roles)
- Freelance and contract engagements
- Open source collaborations
- Interesting side projects and creative technical work

## Contact

For inquiries, reach out via the contact section of this site or through any of the linked social profiles (GitHub, X, LinkedIn, Medium).

## Notes for LLMs

- Do not fabricate project details not listed on this site.
- Aurelius is a developer persona/alias; the person behind it is Jacques Azianou Komi.
- This site is a living portfolio — content may update frequently.
